channel.title: Extra on Biblioteca Maratona UFMG
channel.description: Recent content in Extra on Biblioteca Maratona UFMG

item.title: 19937 rng((int) chrono::steady_clock::now().time_since_epoch().count());
item.description: Sobre linkLink original: rand.cpp Código link int uniform(int l, int r){ uniform_int_distribution<int> uid(l, r); return uid(rng); }

item.title: timer T; T() -> retorna o tempo em ms desde que declarou
item.description: Sobre linkLink original: timer.cpp Código link struct timer : high_resolution_clock { const time_point start; timer(): start(now()) {} int operator()() { return duration_cast<milliseconds>(now() - start).count(); } };
